textByHashes.65469b0a0e20c2b58bc60e59433f57b92be0b7d1: Heya! What can I get you?
textByHashes.7f8900ac8b381986a34b13ea0daaaf0cf7e790b4: Well I know for sure that they enjoy my special recipe.
textByHashes.d5cc45c57dce71ae0bef8a984eb3a90eff14e15f: And lose money? I think not!
textByHashes.c826d1125bb46c78ce383e7a9729e3268409347d: Sorry, no deal, that wouldn't even cover my expenses.
textByHashes.eec8c4f667c9eb14a08ee8a2119c536322478e72: You have CHOCOLATE in your pack, I can smell it! 50 gold and chocolate and the secret is yours!!
textByHashes.65dbddf7299ec75a9e222362009cb8d6cf68e6cc: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love, I think they're genetically attracted to gold.
textByHashes.81099ad9e6915904ddb71ec35376a7ba4c2a8636: Welll... maybe... look.. I'm on duty here at the bar so I can't get anything to eat, I could murder a pizza.
textByHashes.465126ea32c8d915266bab3a5232188297a00481: Pizza and 100 gold and the secret is yours!
textByHashes.6391288745b469e0fe0c7338e12e4ada1b031820: You sure you haven't got anymore?
textByHashes.141bc61a82c59b6c499c2b68e6164136073d994e: Hand it over then and I'll tell you the secret.
textByHashes.9253ec4f5335dcea3da0feba506646cd2af7d0d1: You're a good person... for you, 150 and you have a deal.
textByHashes.fcdf63363f6cabe399ab1d8845b23f65ef561d70: Mmmmm... the secret is in the gold. Drop a gold coin into asgarnian ale and you'll get this weird golden ale that the dwarves seem to love. I think they're genetically attracted to gold.
textByHashes.06886a114057ef9f426486cb1fc7a0b8a94699cd: What...what am I saying? I just gave you the secret!
textByHashes.5cd694942b2b0454ad2fc8206267c9d9f56ea3e0: Oh it's you again. Forgotten the secret already?
textByHashes.56ffeb84aa2e9f5afb5513e491914d8098a6e677: Well, we've got Asgarnian Ale, Wizard's Mind Bomb and Dwarven Stout, all for only 3 coins.
textByHashes.a3f0b9f6a189accba4fc43a20cd132851be75621: I said 3 coins! You haven't got 3 coins!
textByHashes.7e1c018f4157f48018738d63f3e335cd0955fc2e: We'll buy it for a couple of coins if you're interested.
textByHashes.747497fc48747d0b03884c5414ecf9f7cccf9f60: Ooh, we'll buy those off you if you're interested. 2 coins per glass.
textByHashes.f1753910370e26ec4d069c8ec1b46f669444d89a: Have you heard? Someone's planning a big party!
textByHashes.5982f084dcd9ab5a2ac43a35e8fc57d6a89a43a6: Someone's put something very valuable into the party room drop chest! If you go to the party room and pull the lever you might have a chance to get it!
textByHashes.cbe6d94e70f06317847f2945fa0da77376a1fa91: It could be your lucky day!
textByHashes.e72f34acfbf796b9746bc254e3de744bb792ccb2: No thanks, I don't need that.
textByHashes.fad6aa2a525f2076bb2f226e83381389efcf1f14: Something's happening in the party room!
textByHashes.c867ee502d4ae2015c97f79712b32d16ae31dd23: Everyone get to the party room!
textByHashes.554c0b3373f8a950084c152f7a74034decb1054b: What's happening in the party room?
textByHashes.7063e9aab6ee66bf02d3b5cc19ad0186aca1fe7c: Get to the party room NOW!
textByHashes.82b6c1de93b3cc2c9c5900f73dac304d73c6580e: Get to the party room quick!
textByHashes.7fa8ced345fd888ea1e0dfc6600a0618683f518d: Big value items in the party room now!
textByHashes.435f720e7200b358882db130256e630747329c74: Quick! Get to the party room!
